objective: Plan the order-zero bounded Campaign proof, frozen evaluation epoch, exposure ledger, cutoff, target-owner handoff, and preserved one-shot improvement path.
falsifiable_claim: A bounded Campaign cannot self-judge, self-promote, or mutate production, while fixed budgets, epochs, evaluators, negative evidence, and one-shot proposal semantics survive branching and restart.
exit_criteria: Fixed budgets, epoch, evaluator, and negative evidence survive branches and restart and selection reproduces.
Campaign cannot self-judge, self-promote, or mutate; target-owner handoff and one-shot proposal path remain valid.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M8_ORDER_ZERO_IMPROVEMENT_AND_DIRECT_PATH_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Attempt budget, epoch, evaluator, exposure, cutoff, or negative-evidence mutation; branch and restart; self-judge, self-promote, direct-mutate, or bypass target-owner handoff.
remaining_nonclaims: Order zero only; no recursive-seat, ignition, recursive-self-improvement, or stage closure claim.
Campaign coordination grants no wallet authority.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
